ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the line (e.g., Jubilee line) */,
  "start_node" TEXT /* Starting node of the route */,
  "end_node" TEXT /* Ending node of the route */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the route */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the route */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route information was last updated */,
  "route_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., bus, train, tram) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_end_node FOREIGN KEY ("end_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_start_node FOREIGN KEY ("start_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (e.g., station name) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., station, stop, terminal) */,
  "node_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the node */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the node */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the schedule belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the schedule is for */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "headsign" TEXT /* Destination of the trip */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the vehicle operates on */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., train, bus) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "peak_time" TEXT /* Peak time of the day */,
  "passenger_flow" INTEGER /* Passenger flow at each stop */,
  "peak_hour" TEXT /* Peak hour of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the update is for */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the vehicle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Predicted arrival time of the vehicle at the stop */,
  "delay_time" TEXT /* Delay time of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who purchased the ticket */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the ticket is for */,
  "purchase_time" TEXT /* Time the ticket was purchased */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare of the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket */,
  "ticket_validity" TEXT /* Validity period of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the feedback is about */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the fare is for */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fare */,
  "fare_zone" TEXT /* Fare zone for the route */,
  "fare_rules" TEXT /* Rules or restrictions for the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service issue */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the issue is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service issue */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the service issue */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the service issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_issues_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the log is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance log */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the analytic is for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
